content: Just as an intrinsic curiosity mechanism (ICM) prioritizes uncertain, high-learning-gain data for an autonomous agent, 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems could be reengineered to prune and retain memory based on intrinsic curiosity value rather than just recency or task relevance. This creates a 'curiosity-aligned memory archipelago' where only insights that drive future autonomous improvement are retained long-term, instead of cluttering storage with low-value task completion details.
